detectors.description:
Reentrancy in MiniMeToken.approve(address,uint256) (RankingBallGoldCustomToken.sol#519-553):
	External calls:
	- require(bool)(TokenController(controller).onApprove(msg.sender,_spender,_amount)) (RankingBallGoldCustomToken.sol#541)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- allowed[msg.sender][_spender] = _amount (RankingBallGoldCustomToken.sol#547)
	MiniMeToken.allowed (RankingBallGoldCustomToken.sol#235) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- MiniMeToken.allowance(address,address) (RankingBallGoldCustomToken.sol#567-573)
	- MiniMeToken.approve(address,uint256) (RankingBallGoldCustomToken.sol#519-553)
	- MiniMeToken.transferFrom(address,address,uint256) (RankingBallGoldCustomToken.sol#369-399)
